text: On Wed, Nov 01, 2006 at 05:28:08PM +0100, Rudolf Cejka wrote: > I think that I have found a solution here - the patch below simply > joins two ... blocks into one, where white space removal > does not occur in sgml nor in xsl case. It's wrong though; they are separate span's and should be marked up as such. Ceri -- That must be wonderful! I don't understand it at all. -- Moliere
